Hero.sousTitre: I create vibrant paintings directly on your windows and glass surfaces. Each creation is unique, designed for your space and your energy.

About.label: Artistic approach
About.titre:
A sensitivity
that inhabits
every stroke
About.p1: My approach is to come meet you, to immerse myself in your world and the atmosphere of your space, in order to understand what drives you.
About.p2: From this immersion is born a work designed to enhance your window, awaken the curiosity of passersby and invite everyone to cross your doorstep, while inspiring the people who live and work in this space.
About.p3: I paint by working with light: it's a play of absences and presences of paint.
About.p4: On glass, on windows, on all those surfaces that separate and connect.
About.p5: My work is born from deep observation and feelings: those of animals, of nature, of this energy called life.
About.p6: Each creation is a dialogue between the space and the one whose gaze traverses it.

Services.s1Desc: Painting directly on your windows. Shops, restaurants, hotels — I transform your glass surfaces into living artworks that catch the eye and tell your story.
Services.s2Desc: Every space has a soul. I create unique compositions adapted to your identity, your vision, your location. From conception to completion.
Services.s3Desc: For events, exhibitions and ephemeral spaces. Striking creations designed to leave an imprint in the memory of your visitors.

AboutPage.label: About
AboutPage.p1: I am an artist passionate about visual creation in all its forms. My work revolves around three axes: window painting, animal communication, and personal artistic creation.
AboutPage.p2: Since my first projects, I have had the chance to collaborate with many shopkeepers and individuals to bring their spaces to life through unique and custom-made windows.
AboutPage.p3: Animal communication has enriched my practice by bringing a sensitive and intuitive dimension to it. It has allowed me to develop a deeper approach to the bond between humans and animals, which I translate into my creations.
AboutPage.p4: Each project is a new adventure for me, an opportunity to tell a story through colors, shapes and textures.

AnimalPage.label: Sensitivity · Intuition
AnimalPage.intro: Before being a practice, animal communication is a way of being in the world. A listening that I have developed since forever, and which deeply nourishes my artistic work.
AnimalPage.p1: I have been practicing animal communication for years. It is not a tool. It is a language that I have learned to read — in silences, gestures, glances.
AnimalPage.p2: This connection with the living is present in every work. It guides my hand, directs my colors, inspires my forms.
AnimalPage.p3: Animals teach me absolute presence — this quality of attention that I also seek to transmit in my glass creations.
